ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Bond
Off Calendar Mar-30-2021 Off Calendar

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Video Conference:
Michael Spalding for Peter Royce.
Sabrina Royce, in propria persona (beneficiary).

The court noted Ms. Royce needed to submit written objections. Ms. Royce stated that she filed a declaration, that she has issue with her father being the co-trustee because he had a stroke in 2010, that she had mis-connections when she called Mr. Spalding, that she hopes the court would appoint a co-trustee to serve with Kurt Trutner. Mr. Spalding read portions of Ms. Royce's declaration (filed on 2/22/2021) in support of Mr. Trutner's appointment as independent trustee, stated that he has met with Ms. Royce's father and his assessment is that whatever his issues were from 2010 has not compromised his ability as a trustee and that is a matter for another day. Ms. Royce stated her father hasn't returned mail in 10 years, that if her dad wants to do it she is fine with it and fine with Kurt Trutner, and that her dad can't speak and can't hardly walk. The Court stated the requested action is consistent with the trust documents, will interlineate necessity for bond on the proposed order and the Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-26-2021 Continued To Mar-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sabrina Royce (Beneficiary) appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Ms. Royce stated that she is concerned about Kurt Trutner serving as the sole Trustee, that she thought it was agreed upon that there would never be a sole trustee, asked the Court to appoint a co-trustee to work with Mr. Trutner to alleviate her Dad from being a co-trustee, and raised concern about there being no checks and balances. The Court informed Ms. Royce that she needs to put her objections in writing in order for the Court to consider them. The Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee is continued to March 2, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Ms. Royce that her objections need to be filed and served on all of the appropriate parties by February 23, 2021, and that she needs to provide courtesy copies to the Court.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
